name: Onion Bread for Bread Machine
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Yeast (fast rise) or 2 tsp Yeast (active dry)
recipeInstructions:
For Regular Loaf:
1 1/4 cups Water
3 1/4 cups White bread flour
2 tbsp Dry milk
2 tbsp Brown sugar
1 1/2 tsp Salt
2 tbsp Butter
1/2 cup Dried onions
1 tbsp Onion paste
1 tsp Black pepper
1 tsp Poppy seeds
1 1/2 tsp Yeast (fast rise) or 3 tsp Yeast (active dry)
If you can't find onion paste in a tube, substitute onion powder. Use 1/4 tsp for the regular loaf and 1/3 tsp for the large loaf. Onion salt will not work.
+++ The servings are based on 8 for the regular loaf and 12 for the large loaf. Use dried onion flakes, not fresh. This recipe can be baked with the regular or rapid bake cycles. Be sure to follow the instructions for your particular brand of bread baking machine.
Calories: 161
Protein: 12%
Cholesterol: 7.89 mg
Carbohydrates: 75%
